modes.canonical: Repo-owned source file. Edit directly through normal repo review.
modes.generated: Derived output. Regenerate from canonical sources instead of hand-editing.
modes.merged: Live or global user config. Use preview, backup, redaction, explicit approval, apply, and rollback.
modes.symlink: Pointer to canonical repo source. Verify target and do not overwrite unrelated user files.
modes.symlinked-entries: Directory with repo-managed symlink entries. Preserve unrelated user-owned entries.

global_config_rules: Never mutate live global config during planning or dry-run.
Before apply, produce a preview that redacts secrets and private token values.
Before apply, create a backup snapshot outside generated repo outputs.
After apply, run a targeted validation or smoke check for the touched harness.
Rollback must restore the pre-apply snapshot without touching unrelated user-owned entries.
redaction_rules: Never print secret values from .env files or global app configs.
Render credential references as environment variable names or deterministic fingerprints only.
Redact auth tokens, cookies, API keys, OAuth refresh tokens, private keys, and browser profile secrets.
Treat desktop app configs as sensitive even when they are JSON.
